languages.text: "...Естественно". {n}Кажется, ваш вопрос настолько удивляет Соломона, что недоумение на миг подавляет терзающие его чувства.{/n}
"Of course." {n}Your question seems to surprise Solomorne so much that his bafflement drowns out his roiling emotions for a moment.{/n}
languages.original_text: "...Естественно". {n}Кажется, ваш вопрос настолько удивляет Соломона, что недоумение на миг подавляет терзающие его чувства.{/n}

languages.text: « Bien sûr. » {n}Votre question le laisse pantois, à tel point que son étonnement prend le pas sur son angoisse l'espace d'un instant.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Of course." {n}Your question seems to surprise Solomorne so much that his bafflement drowns out his roiling emotions for a moment.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Bien sûr. » {n}Votre question le laisse pantois, à tel point que son étonnement prend le pas sur son angoisse l'espace d'un instant.{/n}

languages.text: 「当然です」{n}あなたの問いかけに、ソロモーンはひどく驚いたようだった。戸惑いが激しい感情を一瞬だけ押し流してしまった。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Of course." {n}Your question seems to surprise Solomorne so much that his bafflement drowns out his roiling emotions for a moment.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 「当然です」{n}あなたの問いかけに、ソロモーンはひどく驚いたようだった。戸惑いが激しい感情を一瞬だけ押し流してしまった。{/n}

languages.text: «Por supuesto». {n}Tu pregunta sorprende tanto a Solomorne que, por un momento, su perplejidad sofoca las demás emociones que siente.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Of course." {n}Your question seems to surprise Solomorne so much that his bafflement drowns out his roiling emotions for a moment.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «Por supuesto». {n}Tu pregunta sorprende tanto a Solomorne que, por un momento, su perplejidad sofoca las demás emociones que siente.{/n}

languages.text: “当然了。”{n}你的问题似乎让索罗蒙困惑不已，他一时之间甚至忘记了愤怒。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Of course." {n}Your question seems to surprise Solomorne so much that his bafflement drowns out his roiling emotions for a moment.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “当然了。”{n}你的问题似乎让索罗蒙困惑不已，他一时之间甚至忘记了愤怒。{/n}

languages.text: "Tabii ki." {n}Solomorne, sorunla o kadar afallıyor ki içinde kopan fırtınalar, bir anlığına şaşkınlığının gölgesinde kalıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Of course." {n}Your question seems to surprise Solomorne so much that his bafflement drowns out his roiling emotions for a moment.{/n}

languages.text: "Natürlich." {n}Deine Frage scheint Solomorne derart zu überraschen, dass seine Verblüffung für einen kurzen Moment seine aufgewühlten Gefühle überdeckt.{/n}
